message.thinking:
We need to produce JSON array with 3 objects. Each object: "question" field: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure". Provide feedback: highlight problems. "complies": true/false.

We examine the given text. It is a short paragraph: "Šajā darbā līdzības jeb plaģiātisma problemātika tiek apskatīta konceptu karšu kontekstā. Lai veiksmīgi izpildīt uzdevumus un sasniegtu bakalaura darba mērķi, ir jāaplūko ne tikai līdzības noteikšanas jēdziens, bet arī jāpēta konceptu karšu būtība un jāatrod risinājums, kas ļautu noteikt līdzības konceptu kartēs."

We need to evaluate:

1. Chapters: Does the text list main sections? No. So fails. Provide feedback: not listing chapters. Complies false.

2. Description: Does it briefly describe contents of each section? No. So fails. Provide feedback: no description of sections. Complies false.

3. Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So fails. Provide feedback: no structure. Complies false.

Thus all false.

But we need to produce exactly 3 objects. Provide feedback accordingly.

Let's craft JSON.
